risk_title: Political and Governance Risk - High Rating Sustained
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as 'High' at both approval and current assessment, indicating persistent fragility in the political environment affecting project implementation in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Province.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating: High

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints for Sustainability Transition
risk_summary: While the KP government has notified a focal agency for CFC transition, the project faces institutional capacity risks as the Provincial Disaster Management Authority (PDMA) staff require training and the transition plan is still pending formal sign-off, creating uncertainty in government ownership and sustainability.
evidence_quote: The Government of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) has notified the Relief, Rehabilitation & Settlement Department as the focal agency to take over the responsibilities on behalf of the provincial government. An initial training of the Provincial Disaster Management Authority's (PDMA) existing staff has also been completed. The KP government has shown strong inclination towards transition of the CFCs and a revised transition plan has been shared by Ministry of Economic Affairs for concurrence and sign off by end of December, 2024.

risk_title: Zero Progress on CFC Transition to Government Management
risk_summary: No Citizen Facilitation Centers have been formally transitioned to KP Government management as of November 2024, despite this being a critical PDO indicator with a target of 30 by project closing in June 2025, indicating governance and institutional capacity challenges.
evidence_quote: Citizen Facilitation Centers transitioned to the KP Government for their management (Number) - Baseline: 0.00, Actual (Current): 0.00, Closing Period Target: 30.00
